# Suggested GitHub Repository Metadata

## Description

Reusable fastlane release template for iOS apps managed by Xcode signing

## Topics

- ios
- fastlane
- testflight
- app-store-connect
- app-store
- release-automation
- xcode

## Suggested first release title

v1.0.0

## Suggested first release notes

Initial public release of a reusable iOS fastlane release template for projects that already manage signing in Xcode.

Includes:

- parameterized `Appfile` and `Fastfile`
- local IPA build and release lanes
- `.env.example` and `fastlane/.env.default`
- installer script for existing iOS projects
- bilingual documentation
